base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of kain_highwind — a character (playable) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Kain Highwind — Dragoon jump-class. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Kain Highwind — Dragoon jump-class; Cecil's best friend, major antagonist-protagonist arc
